$comment: upgrade: verified version bump for a workspace. A thin wrapper over the bump tool (deterministic) so it is --ws friendly. Snapshots go.mod, applies the change, tidies, runs the full go_quality gate, and keeps the change only if it stays clean (else rolls back). Run: `ratchet flow . upgrade --ws <proj> "<pkg>@<ver> | go=<ver> | -u | tidy"`.
summary: Change a dependency/toolchain version in a workspace, verified with the full quality gate and rolled back if it breaks.
